title: Solar is largest source of new US generating capacity for sixth month in a row
description: A review by the SUN DAY Campaign of data recently-released by the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) reveals that for the sixth month in a row, solar provided more new US electrical generating capacity than any other energy source. In addition, solar as well as wind have grown significantly faster than earlier FERC forecasts.
